evidence_quotes.quote: protection of video games at risk of disappearing should also be added (for example, those that always require internet connection and end up operating despite having paid for them).

paragraphs.text: Good afternoon. In addition to the problematic practices already mentioned in the summary, I propose that the protection of video games at risk of disappearing should also be added (for example, those that always require internet connection and end up operating despite having paid for them). By the end of this month, the vote on the citizens’ initiative ‘Stop Destroying Videogames’ with more than 1.400.000 signatures is about to be finalised, so this could demonstrate that there is great concern about the future of certain video games. Thank you for your attention.
